candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; usable as fallback label across years.
Balance sheet liability, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Used both revenue labels as a priority list because they are synonymous and one may be used in different periods.

candidates.why: Explicit cost of revenues / COGS label; best semantic match for direct costs.
Could be part of direct operating costs, but less clearly the primary COGS line than the explicit COGS label.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Cost-of-revenue subcomponent, not the main COGS line.
Inventory/balance sheet item, not income statement COGS expense.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit COGS row over possible components such as Materials and services.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead bucket above operating profit; good SG&A component.
Personnel cost overhead component above operating profit; appropriate SG&A component.
Above-EBIT R&D-style operating expense bucket; included so XSGA-XRD can remove R&D if populated in some years.
Dedicated R&D label exists, but appears in supplemental section below operating profit, so not preferred for SG&A inclusion.
Classic SG&A label, but no evidence it is the primary populated overhead row versus broader operating expense buckets.
Classic SG&A label, but not clearly the primary populated row in preview.

variables.notes: No single explicit populated SG&A total row is present. Selected the best overhead components above operating profit. Included Production and Development Expenses so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD can exclude R&D if that line is used.

candidates.why: Best dedicated above-EBIT R&D/development expense label in statement order.
R&D subcomponent, but less complete than the broader Production and Development Expenses row.
Potential R&D subcomponent, not as complete as broader development expense row.
Dedicated R&D wording, but appears in supplemental section below operating profit, so lower priority by rule.
R&D subcomponent only; should not be used as primary XRD if broader row exists.

variables.notes: Used above-EBIT Production and Development Expenses as primary XRD. Included Research & Development as fallback because it is a semantically correct alternative label, though it appears lower in the statement.

candidates.why: Best available recurring finance cost total; captures interest expense when granular labels are incomplete across years.
Preferred conceptually, but appears incomplete/empty in some years and may overlap with lease-interest subline.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Granular interest component, but narrower than total finance expense and appears to be a subset of interest expense.
May include non-interest and potentially non-recurring items; too broad/ambiguous alone.

variables.notes: Selected the single finance-cost total to avoid double counting because the underlying interest rows appear incomplete and overlapping.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Broader total equity line; lower priority because it may include non-owner items.
Equity component only, not total book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to exclude any non-controlling interests. Included total shareholders equity only as fallback.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not the preferred balance sheet NCI line; also appears empty.

variables.notes: No explicit balance-sheet non-controlling interest / minority interest row is present. Left empty rather than using total equity difference or an income statement allocation line.
